heading: 🔍 Do you recognize someone?
intro: These people were reported as missing. If you recognize someone, open their profile to help reconnect them with their family.
emptyWithFilter: No photos to show with that filter.
footer: We only show photo, name, and area. If you recognize someone, open their profile for more details.

connectivity.offline: 📡 No connection — some data may not load. Your information will be sent when you reconnect.
